title: solanum acaule subsp. albicans
intro: Solanum acaule subsp. albicans, also known as the white form of the "stemless nightshade," is a plant species belonging to the Solanaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Solanum acaule subsp. albicans is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
